name: UNO CHECK CASHING
description_short: UNO CHECK CASHERS is a check-cashing service in Houston, TX offering payroll check cashing, money transfer services via Western Union, and loan product referrals.
description_long:
UNO CHECK CASHERS operates as a check-cashing storefront located at 11103 Briar Forest Dr in Houston, Texas. The business is listed on iPaydayLoans, a loan aggregator platform, and functions primarily as a check-cashing and money services provider rather than a direct lender. According to customer reviews and website content, the business serves the local Houston community with transactional financial services.

The company's core offerings include check cashing for payroll and personal checks, money transfer services through Western Union (both sending and receiving), and referral connections to payday loan lenders and other credit products. The website features loan calculators for payday loans, installment loans, and title loans, though these appear to be broker services rather than products directly underwritten by UNO CHECK CASHERS. The business operates a physical storefront with traditional business hours.

UNO CHECK CASHERS distinguishes itself through customer service focus, with positive reviews highlighting friendly staff and fast transaction processing. The business accepts payroll checks and maintains Western Union partnerships for money transfer needs, serving customers who may lack traditional banking relationships. The 3.5-star rating on iPaydayLoans reflects mixed customer experiences.

As a check-cashing service, this business serves the underbanked and unbanked populations needing quick access to funds from checks without maintaining a bank account. However, the mixed review ratings and at least one complaint about check verification accuracy suggest service consistency may vary. Customers should expect standard check-cashing fees typical to the industry and should verify identification and check details before transactions.
address: 8201 W Sam Houston Pkwy S Ste C, Houston, TX 77072

company_info.headquarters: 8201 W Sam Houston Pkwy S Ste C, Houston, TX 77072

pros: Offers Western Union money transfer services for sending and receiving funds
Cashes payroll checks with same-day availability reported by customers
Physical storefront location provides in-person service and relationship building
Positive customer reviews cite friendly staff and fast service
Serves unbanked and underbanked populations without requiring bank accounts
Provides referral access to multiple loan products through broker partnerships
cons: Mixed customer ratings (3.5 stars) with at least one report of check verification issues and refusal to cash
No online check cashing or remote deposit options available
No published fee schedule on website for check cashing or money transfer services
Limited hours with Sunday closures may not accommodate all customer schedules
Dependent on broker referrals rather than offering direct lending products
best_for: Unbanked workers who receive payroll checks and need immediate cash access
Customers needing domestic money transfers via Western Union without a bank account
Houston-area residents seeking in-person financial services and personal interaction
Individuals exploring payday or installment loan options through a local storefront
diagnosis: UNO CHECK CASHERS is best for unbanked or underbanked workers in Houston who need quick payroll check cashing or Western Union money transfers without a traditional bank account. The primary caveat is inconsistent service quality based on reviews, lack of published fee transparency, and no online or remote service options, requiring in-person visits during limited business hours.
